Video.summary: From “Nosferatu” to “Dracula,” everyone loves blood-sucking Vampires!
Video.title: Viva La Vampire!!

Video.summary: Passengers aboard a Trans-Siberian Express train must fight to stay alive after a prehistoric creature escapes captivity and begins a murder spree.
Video.title: Horror Express

Video.summary: From Hammer hits to Corman classics and more, these movies made Christopher Lee a horror icon.
Video.grandparentTitle: Christopher Lee: From Fangs to Frights
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Norman Bates to Michael Myers and more, these killers love carving up the screen.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Your favorite filmmakers take you inside Britain's iconic Hammer Film factory.
Video.title: Hammered Horror Vol. 1

Video.summary: Take a journey into the heart of Hammer horror with today's top filmmakers.
Video.title: Hammered Horror Vol. 2

Video.summary: From satirical comedies to intense dramas, these war movies capture the chaos, tragedy, and complexity of conflict.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hollywood's greatest heroes fight history's greatest battles in this classic war film collection.
Video.grandparentTitle: This Means War Vol. 2: The Fight for Freedom
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Revisit an epic collection of war films that capture the bravery, sacrifice, and cost of conflict.
Video.grandparentTitle: This Means War Vol. 3: Triumph and Turmoil
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These gripping war films explore the chaos, complexity, and moral ambiguity of conflict on the big screen.
Video.grandparentTitle: This Means War Vol. 4: The Fog of War
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From "Bonnie and Clyde" to "The Royal Tenenbaums," these are the movies that made Gene Hackman a Hollywood legend.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Carrie to Eraserhead and beyond, Stephen King and David Lynch have defined cinematic storytelling for decades.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stephen King Stories and Decoding David Lynch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In a “Deep Red” part of the country, “The Texas Chainsaw Massacre” made all of us squirm like “Three On A Meathook.”
Video.title: Demons, Devils, Chainsaws and Zombies Vol. 1

Image.alt: Demons, Devils, Chainsaws and Zombies Vol. 1
Demons, Devils, Chainsaws and Zombies Vol. 1
Demons, Devils, Chainsaws and Zombies Vol. 1

Video.summary: The nightmare never ends as your favorite filmmakers talk iconic horror movies.
Video.title: Demons, Devils, Chainsaws and Zombies Vol. 2

Image.alt: Demons, Devils, Chainsaws and Zombies Vol. 2
Demons, Devils, Chainsaws and Zombies Vol. 2
Demons, Devils, Chainsaws and Zombies Vol. 2

Video.summary: It was a “Night Of The Living Dead” that “I Walked With A Zombie” to finally meet “Rosemary’s Baby.”
Video.title: Hallowed Horror Vol. 1

Video.summary: It was an eerie night of "Dark Shadows” when I caught the “Brain Dead,” "Cemetery Man” looking just like a “Zombie.” He was caught “Burying The Ex” for her life insurance policy.
Video.title: Hallowed Horror Vol. 2

Video.summary: Mutated beasts, creepy crawlies, and more movie monsters are coming to get you!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From monster mashups and horror hijinks, Bela Lugosi was much more than cinema’s greatest vampire.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Looking back at the iconic films of horror director George A. Romero.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These iconic zombie movies are coming to eat your brain!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From 'Haunted Hill' to Corman classics, Vincent Price sent shivers down the spines of horror fans for decades.
Video.grandparentTitle: Vincent Price: Master of the Silver Scream
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shocked by the death of her spouse, a scheming widow hatches a bold plan to get her hands on the inheritance, unaware that she is targeted by an axe-wielding murderer who lurks in the family's estate. What mystery shrouds the noble house?
Video.title: Dementia 13

Video.summary: A young man turns to a witch doctor to lure the woman he loves away from her fiancé, but instead turns her into a zombie slave.
Video.title: White Zombie

Video.summary: Vincent Price is throwing a party, and he’s invited five strangers with the promise of $10,000 each, if they can survive the night in the House on Haunted Hill. Director William Castle helmed this 1959 horror hit, which famously utilized the “Emergo” theatrical gimmick to spook moviegoers out of their seats.
Video.title: House on Haunted Hill

Video.summary: A young woman tries to escape her traumatic past, only to find herself haunted by a ghoulish mystery man from an abandoned carnival pavilion.
Video.title: Carnival of Souls

Video.summary: A down-on-his-luck Humphrey Bogart teams with a group of crooks chasing their fortune in British East Africa.
Video.title: Beat the Devil

Video.summary: The dead walk! Seven strangers try to survive the night in a Pennsylvania farmhouse surrounded by flesh-eating zombies.
Video.title: Night of the Living Dead

Video.summary: Take a look back at the epic adventures, timeless dramas, and groundbreaking sci-fi classics that defined Charlton Heston's career.
Video.grandparentTitle: Charlton Heston: Man of Monumental Movies
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This is Sidney Poitier at his best: bold roles, powerful stories, and a legacy that transformed American cinema.
Video.title: Episode 1
